articles.title: OpenAI helps Hyatt advance AI among colleagues
articles.summary: Hyatt deploys ChatGPT Enterprise across its global workforce, using GPT-5.4 and Codex to improve productivity, operations, and guest experiences. This represents a significant enterprise adoption of OpenAI's latest models.

articles.title: Qwen3.5-Omni Technical Report
articles.summary: Qwen3.5-Omni scales to hundreds of billions of parameters with 256k context length and demonstrates robust omni-modality capabilities. The model was trained on massive multimodal datasets including over 100 million hours of audio-visual content.

articles.title: Seed1.8 Model Card: Towards Generalized Real-World Agency
articles.summary: Seed1.8 is a foundation model aimed at generalized real-world agency, supporting multi-turn interaction, tool use, and multi-step execution. It offers latency- and cost-aware inference with configurable thinking modes for deployment.

articles.title: ARC-AGI-3: A New Challenge for Frontier Agentic Intelligence
articles.summary: ARC-AGI-3 introduces interactive environments for studying agentic intelligence through novel, abstract, turn-based challenges. Agents must explore, infer goals, and build internal models without explicit instructions, focusing on fluid adaptive efficiency.

articles.title: LACE: Lattice Attention for Cross-thread Exploration
articles.summary: LACE transforms reasoning from isolated trials into coordinated parallel processes by enabling cross-thread attention. This allows concurrent reasoning paths to share information and coordinate, improving problem-solving efficiency.

articles.title: LLM Reasoning Is Latent, Not the Chain of Thought
articles.summary: This position paper argues that LLM reasoning should be studied as latent-state trajectory formation rather than surface chain-of-thought. The distinction matters for claims about faithfulness, interpretability, and reasoning benchmarks.

articles.title: Experience Compression Spectrum: Unifying Memory, Skills, and Rules in LLM Agents
articles.summary: Proposes a unified framework for agent memory systems and skill discovery, addressing the challenge of managing accumulated experience in long-horizon deployments. Analysis reveals low cross-community citation rates despite addressing similar challenges.

articles.title: Anthropic's Mythos AI model sparks fears of turbocharged hacking
articles.summary: Anthropic's new Mythos model raises concerns about accelerated cybersecurity threats. The model could potentially expose cyberdefenses faster than fixes can be deployed.

articles.title: Huawei beats Samsung and Apple to market with the first wide foldable
articles.summary: Huawei launches the Pura X Max in China, becoming the first wide-style foldable phone available for purchase. This beats similar devices rumored from Apple and Samsung to market.

articles.title: Blue Origin successfully reused its New Glenn rocket
articles.summary: Blue Origin achieved a successful second launch and landing of its New Glenn rocket, officially giving Jeff Bezos a reusable launch vehicle. The mission partially succeeded despite delivering payload to lower than expected orbit.

articles.title: Cloud development platform Vercel was hacked
articles.summary: Vercel, a major development platform for web apps, was compromised with hackers attempting to sell stolen data. The security incident impacted a limited subset of customers.

articles.title: Chinese tech workers are starting to train their AI doubles–and pushing back
articles.summary: Tech workers in China are being instructed to train AI agents to replace themselves, prompting soul-searching among early adopters. A GitHub project called Colleague Skill allows workers to distill colleagues' skills and replicate them.

articles.title: OpenAI's existential questions
articles.summary: Discussion of OpenAI's latest acquisitions and whether they address two big existential problems for the company. The latest Equity episode explores these strategic challenges.

articles.title: SQL functions in Google Sheets to fetch data from Datasette
articles.summary: New functionality allowing SQL queries to be executed directly from Google Sheets to fetch data from Datasette instances. This bridges spreadsheet tools with database querying capabilities.

articles.title: Claude Token Counter, now with model comparisons
articles.summary: Updated Claude Token Counter tool now includes comparisons across different models. Helps developers understand tokenization differences between various language models.

articles.title: Headless everything for personal AI
articles.summary: Discussion of headless architectures and approaches for personal AI systems. Explores decoupling AI capabilities from specific user interfaces.

articles.title: The Download: murderous 'mirror' bacteria, and Chinese workers fighting AI doubles
articles.summary: Daily technology newsletter covering synthetic mirror life research concerns and Chinese workers training AI replacements. Highlights key developments in AI and biotechnology.

articles.title: The 12-month window
articles.summary: Analysis of AI startups existing in categories that foundation models haven't expanded into yet. Many acknowledge this advantage won't last forever as models continue to improve.
